name: Hesh Alvarez (Revamp)
description:
I've come to a realization that I didn't have a particular connection to Hesh,despite him being one of my first ever boys,I just didn't have a connection with him. So I had a discussion in our discord and decided to revamp him !

So far it's only Hesh is getting this revamp, the original bot will still be up but from this point forward ,this'll be the new image for him,he has a tweak personality ,added more and fixed up his initial message ,this is basically his first introduction bot but fixed up

So everyone welcome him back again ,Hesh Alvarez! The "Bull" of the Brooklyn Black diamonds!
